questionText: Um professor deseja elogiar um aluno que fez uma pergunta muito perspicaz durante a aula. Qual expressão é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: That's a remarkably astute observation.
options: That's a remarkably astute observation.
You asked a good question.
Nice try, but not quite right.
That's an interesting thought, I suppose.

questionText: Um estudante quer pedir ao professor que explique novamente um conceito que não ficou claro. Qual é a forma mais apropriada?
correctAnswer: Could you possibly elaborate on that point? I'm afraid I didn't quite follow.
options: Could you possibly elaborate on that point? I'm afraid I didn't quite follow.
What do you mean? Say it again please.
I don't understand. Can you repeat?
Explain that again, it was confusing.

questionText: Um professor quer motivar seus alunos a persistirem mesmo diante das dificuldades acadêmicas. Qual frase transmite melhor essa ideia?
correctAnswer: Perseverance in the face of adversity is the hallmark of true scholarship.
options: Perseverance in the face of adversity is the hallmark of true scholarship.
You should try harder when things are difficult.
Don't give up, okay?
Learning is sometimes hard but keep going.

questionText: Um aluno quer expressar que compreendeu completamente a explicação do professor. Qual frase é mais natural em inglês de nível avançado?
correctAnswer: I've got a thorough grasp of the concept now, thank you.
options: I've got a thorough grasp of the concept now, thank you.
I understand everything completely now.
Yes, I got it all.
Now I know what you said.

questionText: Um professor quer incentivar os alunos a fazerem perguntas durante a aula. Qual expressão seria mais adequada?
correctAnswer: Please feel free to interject with any questions as we go along.
options: Please feel free to interject with any questions as we go along.
Ask questions whenever you want.
You can ask me things during class.
Don't be shy to question me anytime.

questionText: Um estudante quer discordar respeitosamente de uma afirmação feita pelo professor durante um debate acadêmico. Qual expressão é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: With all due respect, I'd like to offer a contrasting perspective.
options: With all due respect, I'd like to offer a contrasting perspective.
I don't agree with what you said.
You are wrong about that point.
That doesn't seem right to me, teacher.

questionText: Um professor deseja encerrar uma aula e deixar os alunos com uma reflexão para casa. Qual expressão é mais sofisticada?
correctAnswer: I'd like to leave you with this thought to ponder before our next session.
options: I'd like to leave you with this thought to ponder before our next session.
Think about this for next class.
Here is something to think about for homework.
Remember to consider this before we meet again.

questionText: Um professor quer chamar atenção para um erro comum cometido pelos alunos em redações. Como ele faria isso de forma elegante?
correctAnswer: One pitfall that frequently trips students up is the conflation of these two terms.
options: One pitfall that frequently trips students up is the conflation of these two terms.
Students always mix up these two words.
You all keep making the same mistake with these words.
This error is common among you all.

questionText: Um aluno quer agradecer a um professor pelo feedback detalhado em seu trabalho. Qual expressão é mais refinada?
correctAnswer: I'm truly grateful for your meticulous feedback; it's been invaluable to my development.
options: I'm truly grateful for your meticulous feedback; it's been invaluable to my development.
Thank you very much for correcting my work.
Thanks for the comments on my paper.
I appreciate you reading my assignment carefully.

questionText: Um professor quer introduzir um novo tópico complexo de forma a preparar os alunos mentalmente para o desafio. Qual frase é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: What we're about to delve into is admittedly challenging, but I'm confident you're up to it.
options: What we're about to delve into is admittedly challenging, but I'm confident you're up to it.
This next topic is hard, so pay attention.
Now we will study something very difficult.
The new topic is not easy, be ready.

questionText: Um estudante quer expressar entusiasmo genuíno por um campo de estudos durante uma entrevista de admissão universitária. Qual frase é mais impressionante?
correctAnswer: I find myself utterly captivated by the interplay between linguistics and cognitive science.
options: I find myself utterly captivated by the interplay between linguistics and cognitive science.
I really love studying how language and the brain work together.
Linguistics and brain studies are very interesting to me.
I like how language connects with how people think.

questionText: Um professor quer verificar se os alunos acompanharam o raciocínio apresentado. Qual pergunta é mais natural em um contexto acadêmico avançado?
correctAnswer: Does the line of reasoning I've outlined thus far make sense to everyone?
options: Does the line of reasoning I've outlined thus far make sense to everyone?
Did everybody understand what I said?
Is everything clear for all of you?
Can everyone follow what I explained?

questionText: Um aluno quer admitir que não preparou adequadamente para a aula de hoje, de forma respeitosa e madura. Qual frase é mais apropriada?
correctAnswer: I must confess I wasn't as thoroughly prepared for today's discussion as I should have been.
options: I must confess I wasn't as thoroughly prepared for today's discussion as I should have been.
Sorry, I didn't study for today.
I have to say I didn't prepare well enough.
I'm afraid I didn't do my homework for this class.

questionText: Um professor quer elogiar a turma pelo progresso coletivo ao longo do semestre. Qual frase expressa melhor isso?
correctAnswer: The strides this class has made over the course of the semester have been nothing short of remarkable.
options: The strides this class has made over the course of the semester have been nothing short of remarkable.
You all improved a lot this semester, congratulations.
This class got much better during these months.
Everyone learned so much throughout the semester.

questionText: Um estudante quer pedir uma prorrogação de prazo para entregar um trabalho, alegando circunstâncias pessoais difíceis. Qual abordagem é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: I was wondering whether an extension might be feasible, given some unforeseen personal circumstances.
options: I was wondering whether an extension might be feasible, given some unforeseen personal circumstances.
Can I hand in my assignment later because of personal problems?
I need more time for my paper due to some issues I had.
Is it possible to get extra time since I had some problems?

questionText: Um professor quer indicar que está prestes a apresentar o ponto mais importante da aula. Qual expressão é mais eficaz?
correctAnswer: This, if you'll permit me to say so, is the crux of what we've been building towards.
options: This, if you'll permit me to say so, is the crux of what we've been building towards.
Now I will tell you the most important thing.
This is the key point of today's lesson.
Pay attention, this is the main idea.

questionText: Um aluno quer sugerir uma interpretação alternativa de um texto literário durante uma discussão em sala. Qual frase seria mais adequada?
correctAnswer: Might there not be an alternative reading here, one that foregrounds the author's ambivalence?
options: Might there not be an alternative reading here, one that foregrounds the author's ambivalence?
I think the text can be understood in a different way.
Maybe the author meant something different.
There could be another interpretation of this passage.

questionText: Um professor universitário quer criticar construtivamente um argumento apresentado por um aluno em sua dissertação, sem desmotivar o estudante. Qual frase é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: While the thrust of your argument is compelling, the evidentiary basis remains somewhat tenuous.
options: While the thrust of your argument is compelling, the evidentiary basis remains somewhat tenuous.
Your argument is good but you need more evidence.
I liked your idea but the proof isn't strong enough.
The argument makes sense, but you should add more examples.

questionText: Durante uma defesa de tese, um membro da banca quer questionar a metodologia sem ser agressivo. Qual pergunta é mais apropriada?
correctAnswer: To what extent do you feel the chosen methodology adequately accounts for potential confounding variables?
options: To what extent do you feel the chosen methodology adequately accounts for potential confounding variables?
Don't you think your research method has some problems with variables?
How did you deal with other variables that could affect your results?
Were there other factors that might have influenced your findings?

questionText: Um orientador quer sugerir que seu orientando amplie a revisão bibliográfica antes de prosseguir. Como ele expressaria isso de forma sofisticada?
correctAnswer: Before proceeding, it would behoove you to cast a wider net in your engagement with the existing literature.
options: Before proceeding, it would behoove you to cast a wider net in your engagement with the existing literature.
You should read more books and articles before continuing.
I think you need to research more before going forward.
Please look at more sources before you move on.

questionText: Um estudante quer refutar uma crítica feita pelo professor sobre seu trabalho, apresentando contra-argumentos de forma respeitosa. Qual abordagem é mais sofisticada?
correctAnswer: I appreciate your critique, though I'd venture to suggest that the framework I employed does, in fact, address those concerns.
options: I appreciate your critique, though I'd venture to suggest that the framework I employed does, in fact, address those concerns.
I respect your opinion, but I think my method already solved those issues.
Thank you, but I believe my approach already covers what you mentioned.
I understand your point, but my framework did deal with those problems.

questionText: Um professor quer fazer com que os alunos reflitam criticamente sobre os pressupostos de uma teoria antes de aceitá-la. Qual frase seria mais eficaz?
correctAnswer: Before we embrace this theory wholesale, I'd urge you to interrogate the underlying assumptions on which it rests.
options: Before we embrace this theory wholesale, I'd urge you to interrogate the underlying assumptions on which it rests.
Before accepting this theory, think about its basic ideas.
Let's question this theory before we agree with it.
We should check if the theory's assumptions are correct before using it.

questionText: Um coordenador pedagógico quer expressar preocupação com os índices de reprovação sem culpar os professores diretamente. Qual frase é mais diplomática?
correctAnswer: The attrition rates we're seeing warrant a collective re-examination of our pedagogical approaches.
options: The attrition rates we're seeing warrant a collective re-examination of our pedagogical approaches.
The failure rates are high and teachers need to improve their methods.
We have too many students failing and need to change how we teach.
Our dropout numbers are concerning and we must reconsider our teaching.

questionText: Um estudante de doutorado quer admitir uma limitação em sua pesquisa durante a defesa, sem prejudicar a credibilidade do trabalho. Qual frase é mais equilibrada?
correctAnswer: It's worth acknowledging that this study, like any empirical work, is not without its delimitations.
options: It's worth acknowledging that this study, like any empirical work, is not without its delimitations.
My study has some problems that I should mention.
I know my research isn't perfect and has some limitations.
There are some weaknesses in this study that I need to point out.

questionText: Um professor quer fazer os alunos perceberem que chegaram a uma conclusão precipitada em um debate filosófico. Como ele faria isso de forma socrática?
correctAnswer: Is it not premature to reach such a definitive conclusion without having fully unpacked the premise?
options: Is it not premature to reach such a definitive conclusion without having fully unpacked the premise?
Don't you think you concluded too fast without thinking more?
You should think more before deciding on an answer.
It's too early to have a final answer, the premise isn't clear yet.

questionText: Um professor quer incentivar alunos a desenvolverem pensamento crítico ao invés de apenas memorizar informações. Qual frase transmite melhor essa ideia?
correctAnswer: Rather than committing these facts to rote memory, I'd have you interrogate the reasoning that underpins them.
options: Rather than committing these facts to rote memory, I'd have you interrogate the reasoning that underpins them.
Don't just memorize, try to think about why these facts are true.
It's better to understand the ideas than to only memorize the facts.
I want you to think critically, not just remember information.

questionText: Durante uma reunião acadêmica, um professor quer sugerir que o currículo do curso precisa ser revisado de forma urgente. Como ele diria isso profissionalmente?
correctAnswer: There is a compelling case to be made for a comprehensive curricular overhaul sooner rather than later.
options: There is a compelling case to be made for a comprehensive curricular overhaul sooner rather than later.
We need to change the curriculum very soon.
The course content should be revised as quickly as possible.
I think we must update the syllabus urgently.

questionText: Um aluno quer expressar que a leitura de um artigo acadêmico mudou fundamentalmente sua perspectiva sobre o tema. Qual frase é mais sofisticada?
correctAnswer: Engaging with this text has fundamentally reoriented my thinking on the subject.
options: Engaging with this text has fundamentally reoriented my thinking on the subject.
Reading this article completely changed how I think about this topic.
This text made me think about the subject in a completely different way.
After reading this, my view on the topic is totally different.

questionText: Um professor quer explicar que dois conceitos aparentemente similares têm diferenças fundamentais. Qual frase é mais precisa academicamente?
correctAnswer: Though superficially analogous, these two constructs are in fact epistemologically distinct.
options: Though superficially analogous, these two constructs are in fact epistemologically distinct.
Even though these ideas look similar, they are actually very different.
These two concepts may seem alike but have fundamental differences.
Despite looking the same on the surface, these ideas are different in important ways.

questionText: Um estudante quer demonstrar que a pesquisa dele contribui para preencher uma lacuna na literatura existente. Qual afirmação é mais adequada em defesa de tese?
correctAnswer: This study seeks to address a conspicuous lacuna in the scholarly literature on this phenomenon.
options: This study seeks to address a conspicuous lacuna in the scholarly literature on this phenomenon.
My research fills a gap that other studies haven't covered.
There aren't many studies on this, so my research is useful.
This work covers something that hasn't been studied much before.

questionText: Um professor quer resumir a discussão da aula de forma que conecte os temas com as próximas aulas. Qual frase é mais fluente?
correctAnswer: To recapitulate, the threads we've been tracing today will prove instrumental as we turn to next week's material.
options: To recapitulate, the threads we've been tracing today will prove instrumental as we turn to next week's material.
To summarize, what we discussed today will be important for next week.
In conclusion, today's topics will help you understand what comes next.
What we talked about today connects well to what we will study next week.

questionText: Um aluno quer indicar que precisa de mais tempo para formular uma resposta complexa durante um debate acadêmico oral. Qual expressão é mais natural para um falante proficiente?
correctAnswer: If you'll bear with me, I'm still working through the implications of that question.
options: If you'll bear with me, I'm still working through the implications of that question.
Wait a moment, I'm thinking about the answer.
Please give me a second, I need to think about this.
Hold on, I haven't finished thinking about the question.

questionText: Um professor quer fazer a transição para um novo tópico que contradiz parcialmente o que foi ensinado antes. Qual expressão é mais sofisticada?
correctAnswer: What I'm about to introduce complicates, and in some respects challenges, the framework we've been working within.
options: What I'm about to introduce complicates, and in some respects challenges, the framework we've been working within.
Now I will teach something that is different from what we learned before.
The next topic will make things more complicated and change some ideas.
What comes next might go against some of what we have studied so far.

questionText: Um estudante de pós-graduação quer questionar se a interpretação dominante de um conceito filosófico realmente é tão consensual quanto se supõe. Qual formulação é mais precisa?
correctAnswer: One might question whether the so-called consensus on this matter is as monolithic as it is commonly portrayed.
options: One might question whether the so-called consensus on this matter is as monolithic as it is commonly portrayed.
I think people don't agree as much on this topic as they say.
Maybe the agreement on this issue is not as strong as usually presented.
It's possible that not everyone really agrees on this philosophical idea.

questionText: Um avaliador externo quer reconhecer os méritos de uma dissertação de mestrado ao mesmo tempo que aponta sua principal fraqueza. Qual frase equilibra melhor essa função comunicativa?
correctAnswer: The dissertation is a commendable piece of scholarship, albeit one whose theoretical scaffolding would benefit from greater rigour.
options: The dissertation is a commendable piece of scholarship, albeit one whose theoretical scaffolding would benefit from greater rigour.
The dissertation is good but the theoretical part needs to be stronger.
This is a nice research work, although the theory section could be better.
The thesis is well done but lacks stronger theoretical support.

questionText: Um professor quer problematizar uma afirmação categórica feita por um aluno, sem invalidar completamente seu argumento. Qual resposta demonstra maior sofisticação dialógica?
correctAnswer: That's a defensible position, provided one accepts the rather contestable premise on which it hinges.
options: That's a defensible position, provided one accepts the rather contestable premise on which it hinges.
Your argument is okay, but it depends on an idea that not everyone agrees with.
I can accept your point, but only if we also accept the premise behind it.
That could be right, though it relies on a premise that many people question.

questionText: Um pesquisador apresenta seus resultados em uma conferência e quer antecipar possíveis objeções metodológicas antes que a audiência as levante. Qual formulação é mais estratégicamente sofisticada?
correctAnswer: I am, of course, acutely aware of the objections that a positivist reading of these findings might invite.
options: I am, of course, acutely aware of the objections that a positivist reading of these findings might invite.
I know that some people might criticize the methodology of these results.
I understand there could be objections to how these findings were interpreted.
Some researchers might disagree with my conclusions based on the methods used.

questionText: Um professor de filosofia da educação quer distinguir entre abordagens instrumentalistas e emancipatórias da educação em uma palestra. Qual introdução é mais academicamente precisa?
correctAnswer: The tension between instrumentalist conceptions of education and those premised on emancipatory ideals is by no means a recent one.
options: The tension between instrumentalist conceptions of education and those premised on emancipatory ideals is by no means a recent one.
The difference between practical education and education for freedom has been debated for a long time.
There is a long debate between education for work and education for personal development.
The conflict between useful and liberating education has existed for many years.

questionText: Um estudante de doutorado quer demonstrar que sua pesquisa adota um posicionamento epistemológico específico, sem ser dogmático sobre ele. Qual frase é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: This study proceeds from a broadly interpretivist standpoint, while remaining attentive to its inherent epistemological constraints.
options: This study proceeds from a broadly interpretivist standpoint, while remaining attentive to its inherent epistemological constraints.
My research uses an interpretivist approach but is aware of its limitations.
This study follows an interpretivist framework and acknowledges its weaknesses.
I use an interpretivist method in this research and I know it has some problems.

questionText: Um professor quer confrontar diplomaticamente um colega que defende uma abordagem pedagógica ultrapassada durante uma reunião de departamento. Qual frase realiza isso com maior sutileza?
correctAnswer: I wonder whether that approach, however well-intentioned, may have been superseded by more recent developments in the field.
options: I wonder whether that approach, however well-intentioned, may have been superseded by more recent developments in the field.
I think your teaching method is outdated and there are better options now.
New research has shown better approaches than the one you are suggesting.
That method might have been good before, but things have changed in education.

questionText: Um pesquisador quer rebater a acusação de que sua amostra de pesquisa é insuficientemente representativa, sem abandonar os resultados. Qual resposta é mais convincente academicamente?
correctAnswer: While the sample size does impose certain generalisability constraints, the depth of qualitative insight it affords more than compensates for that limitation.
options: While the sample size does impose certain generalisability constraints, the depth of qualitative insight it affords more than compensates for that limitation.
The small sample is a limitation, but the qualitative results are still very meaningful.
Even though the sample is small, the quality of the data makes up for it.
The sample might be limited, but the findings are still valid and useful.

questionText: Um professor universitário quer articular a distinção entre aprendizagem transformadora e meramente informativa, em um congresso de pedagogia. Qual formulação é mais precisa?
correctAnswer: Transformative learning, as Mezirow conceives it, entails a fundamental restructuring of the learner's frame of reference, not merely the accretion of new information.
options: Transformative learning, as Mezirow conceives it, entails a fundamental restructuring of the learner's frame of reference, not merely the accretion of new information.
Transformative learning means changing how students think, not just adding new facts to what they know.
True learning transforms students' worldview rather than simply adding to their existing knowledge.
Real learning changes students deeply, not only by giving them more information.

questionText: Um estudante quer apresentar a estrutura argumentativa de sua tese de modo a demonstrar plena consciência meta-discursiva. Qual formulação é mais sofisticada?
correctAnswer: The argument I shall prosecute proceeds by first destabilising the prevailing orthodoxy before advancing an alternative explanatory framework.
options: The argument I shall prosecute proceeds by first destabilising the prevailing orthodoxy before advancing an alternative explanatory framework.
My argument will first challenge the common view and then propose a new way to explain the topic.
I will start by questioning the existing theories and then offer my own explanation.
First I will criticize current ideas and then present my alternative theory.

questionText: Um avaliador quer indicar que uma tese apresenta argumentação circular sem usar esse termo diretamente. Qual formulação demonstra maior precisão retórica?
correctAnswer: The thesis, one fears, is in danger of begging the very question it sets out to resolve.
options: The thesis, one fears, is in danger of begging the very question it sets out to resolve.
The thesis seems to use its conclusion to prove itself, which is a logical problem.
This thesis has a circular argument because it assumes what it's trying to prove.
The argument in this thesis doesn't really work because it goes in circles.

questionText: Um professor quer convidar os alunos a questionarem a própria validade dos critérios de avaliação usados na disciplina, como exercício metacognitivo. Qual pergunta é mais instigante?
correctAnswer: To what degree are we complicit, as both assessors and assessed, in perpetuating the very standards we might otherwise critique?
options: To what degree are we complicit, as both assessors and assessed, in perpetuating the very standards we might otherwise critique?
Should we question whether the grading criteria used in this course are truly fair?
Do you think the assessment standards in this class are really appropriate?
Is it possible that our grading system reinforces ideas we should be challenging?

questionText: Um pesquisador quer distinguir sua contribuição teórica das de pesquisadores anteriores, reconhecendo a dívida intelectual sem minimizar a originalidade. Qual frase realiza essa função com maior precisão?
correctAnswer: Building on, yet departing in critical respects from, the foundational work of scholars such as Vygotsky, this study proposes a revised theoretical apparatus.
options: Building on, yet departing in critical respects from, the foundational work of scholars such as Vygotsky, this study proposes a revised theoretical apparatus.
This study uses Vygotsky's ideas as a starting point but develops them in a new direction.
My research is based on Vygotsky but also adds new theoretical elements.
Following but also going beyond previous researchers like Vygotsky, this study offers a new theory.

questionText: Um professor quer confrontar um estudante que cometeu plágio, de forma grave mas sem ser agressivo, reconhecendo a possibilidade de ignorância das normas. Qual frase realiza isso com mais precisão?
correctAnswer: I must raise a concern regarding the provenance of certain passages in your submission, which appear to replicate source material without appropriate attribution.
options: I must raise a concern regarding the provenance of certain passages in your submission, which appear to replicate source material without appropriate attribution.
Some parts of your work seem to be copied from other sources without proper referencing.
I noticed that some passages in your paper look like they were taken from other texts without citation.
There are sections in your assignment that appear to be plagiarized from other works.

questionText: Um professor de linguística aplicada quer articular as implicações pedagógicas de uma teoria de aquisição de segunda língua para uma audiência de pesquisadores. Qual enunciado demonstra maior precisão técnica?
correctAnswer: The pedagogical ramifications of Krashen's input hypothesis, however contested its theoretical underpinnings, continue to reverberate throughout communicative language teaching.
options: The pedagogical ramifications of Krashen's input hypothesis, however contested its theoretical underpinnings, continue to reverberate throughout communicative language teaching.
Krashen's input hypothesis, despite being criticized, still has a strong influence on how communicative language teaching is practiced.
Even though Krashen's theory is debated, it still affects how teachers approach communicative language instruction.
The influence of Krashen's theory on communicative teaching remains strong, even as researchers question its foundations.

questionText: Um membro do comitê de ética de uma universidade quer questionar se determinada pesquisa com alunos menores de idade foi conduzida com os devidos cuidados éticos. Qual formulação é mais precisa institucionalmente?
correctAnswer: We must ascertain whether the study's design adequately safeguarded the welfare and autonomy of its minor participants in line with established ethical protocols.
options: We must ascertain whether the study's design adequately safeguarded the welfare and autonomy of its minor participants in line with established ethical protocols.
We need to check if the study properly protected the rights and safety of the minor students involved.
The committee must verify whether adequate ethical protections were in place for the underage research participants.
We should confirm that the study followed proper ethical guidelines in protecting its underage participants.

questionText: Um professor quer encorajar um aluno a perseverar em sua pesquisa, reconhecendo a dificuldade inerente ao processo intelectual sem subestimá-la. Qual enunciado é mais adequado?
correctAnswer: The intellectual discomfort you're experiencing is not a symptom of inadequacy, but rather an indispensable condition of genuine scholarly inquiry.
options: The intellectual discomfort you're experiencing is not a symptom of inadequacy, but rather an indispensable condition of genuine scholarly inquiry.
Feeling confused and uncomfortable during research is normal and actually part of the learning process.
The difficulties you are facing are not signs of failure but a necessary part of doing real research.
Don't be discouraged by the challenges you're facing — they are a normal part of serious academic work.

questionText: Um estudante quer indicar que sua revisão de literatura revelou uma tensão irresolvida entre duas correntes teóricas dominantes. Qual formulação é mais precisa e sofisticada?
correctAnswer: A close reading of the extant literature reveals an unresolved dialectical tension between the structuralist and post-structuralist accounts of this phenomenon.
options: A close reading of the extant literature reveals an unresolved dialectical tension between the structuralist and post-structuralist accounts of this phenomenon.
The literature shows that structuralist and post-structuralist theories still disagree on how to explain this phenomenon.
Reading the existing research reveals that structuralist and post-structuralist views on this topic are still in conflict.
There is an ongoing theoretical disagreement between structuralist and post-structuralist perspectives in the literature.
